BUSINESS ANALYTICS MINOR

Program Director: Kazim Ruhi, Ph.D.

The Minor in Business Analytics integrates technology with statistical and quantitative modeling techniques to provide students with the foundation needed for data driven decision making, as well as for graduate study in the ﬁeld of Business Analytics. Students with these skills are in high demand in a variety of industries and sectors including marketing, ﬁnance, information systems, operations, health care and energy.
